posts.author: gael.larregaray (Gael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community,

I am on an enterprise plan, and I am aware that I can enable/disable export, but we are limited to No one/Admins/Everyone.

Would it be possible to expand these options to:

  1. Overall: permissions for Non One/Admins Only/Admins + Users/Everyone (incl. viewers)
  2. Board specific: enable export permissions for boards

Thank you,

Gael
